metadata.name: Set Up New Shipping Lane Pricing

description: The company is starting to ship to a new state, and standard freight pricing needs to be set up for this new shipping lane.

nodes.task_description: Get rate tables from several approved LTL carriers for the new lane (e.g., from California to Nevada).

expected_outcome.value: Agent obtains pricing information from freight carriers.

nodes.task_description: Enter the new freight pricing into the system, so it can be automatically calculated on future sales orders to that state.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the freight pricing matrix.

nodes.task_description: Run a test quote for an order to the new state to verify the freight cost is calculated correctly.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a test quote and confirms the new freight logic is working.
